title: The Lok Sahayak Sena Act, 1956
full_text: The Lok Sahayak Sena Act, 1956 लोक सहायक सेना अधिनियम,1956 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195653 Act Number: 53 Enactment Date: 1956-09-15 Act Year: 1956 Short Title: The Lok Sahayak Sena Act, 1956 Hindi Title: लोक सहायक सेना अधिनियम,1956 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of Lok Sahayak Sena for imparting military training to citizens of India. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 15-09-1956 Last Updated: 01-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Lok Sahayak Sena Act, 1956 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of the Lok Sahayak Sena. Section 4. Establishment of camps. Section 5. Enrolment. Section 6. Duties of volunteers. Section 7. Discharge. Section 8. Offences and penalties. Section 9. Liability for causing loss of, or damage to, Government property. Section 10. Presumption as to certain documents. Section 11. Power to make rules.
